# 4NodeTech

> Software, AI and digital growth agency. We help startups and businesses launch, automate, and scale through technology, design, and AI.

4NodeTech is a family-founded technology studio offering web and mobile development, AI solutions and automation, Shopify development, SEO and digital marketing, branding and lead generation, and cloud and DevOps consulting.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, why-choose-us, and testimonials.
- [Services](/services): Detailed list of web, mobile, AI, Shopify, SEO, branding and DevOps services.
- [About](/about): Company story, mission, vision and core values.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Selected case studies and shipped products.
- [Contact](/contact): Project inquiry form and direct contact details.
